title: Buttery Crumbly Malaysian Beef Kidney Crumble
description: This moist and buttery crumble is a perfect comfort food for monsoon days, featuring tender beef kidneys in a whole30-friendly whole grain topping.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add shallots. Sauté until soft.
Add ginger, salt, pepper, and flour to the shallot mixture. Stir well for 2 minutes.
Crush tomatoes into smaller pieces and stir them with the shallot mixture.
Place beef kidneys on medium-high heat for about 10-15 minutes or until they are cooked through.
Mix in half of the crumble flour over the top, add a little water to create a creamy sauce.
Transfer kidneys and sauce into a baking dish. Add remaining crumble flour evenly over the kidney mixture.
Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
